away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Nyara Sabally
players.injury_comment: Sabally is set to miss her third game of the year Friday. Her next chance to play arrives Sunday versus the Dream. Laura Juskaite and Maria Conde should both see increased playing time in the frontcourt in Sabally's absence.

injuries.name: Nyara Sabally

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Kiki Iriafen
players.injury_comment: Iriafen tweaked her right ankle in Monday's 78-76 loss to Indiana, ending her night after only eight minutes of work. Iriafen will now miss her first game of the 2026 campaign, meaning Cotie McMahon or Angela Dugalic could be in line to replace her in the starting lineup.
